race.comment: The babies kick us off. HELL OR HEAVEN (3) was well in the market at Doomben on debut but just missed the frame on that occasion. Will have derived a stack of benefit from that race day experience and where there's smoke there's fire. Sure to be right there at the business end. GIRMAY (2) was okay in Saturday grade when facing the starter for the first time before being tipped out for further time to furnish. Has since tuned up for this with two recent trials and gets the services of gun hoop Maloney on board from the inside alley. Looms as the main danger. SAXON SPIRIT (7) wasn't too far away first start and will have come on with that run now under the belt. Top-three conveyance. MONARCHAL (4) strips fitter second-up from the spell and may earn some minor money. ZIA MARIA (9) has shown ability at the trials and should be kept very safe.
